description: Pre-PR quality gate for the Pocket monorepos (pocket, pocket-admin). Runs before marking a PR ready for review — executes the real repo toolchain (just lint/test/sqlc/ids/check-migrations, biome check, vite build + tsc), applies encoded Pocket team conventions from review history, runs semantic review subagents, checks non-code artifacts (branch name, commit messages, PR description, Linear ticket, staged secrets). Use this skill whenever the user says "check pr", "check the pr", "ready for review", "pre-PR check", "preflight", "check my worktree", "final review before PR", "about to mark this ready", "is this good to ship", or when they finish feature work in a pocket repo and mention opening or updating a PR. Surfaces findings grouped by severity and waits for explicit approval before applying any fixes. Never commits, never pushes.
